inputs.label: Total Items
inputs.businessContext: Total number of items in the set

inputs.label: Items to Choose
inputs.businessContext: Number of items selected without regard to order

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the result

formulas.combinations: (()=>{let c=(()=>{let r=1;for(let i=1;i<=k;i++)r=r*(n-k+i)/i;return r})(); return decimalPlaces>0? Math.round(c*Math.pow(10,decimalPlaces))/Math.pow(10,decimalPlaces): Math.round(c);})()
